name: Kaonavi
description: Japans leading talent management SaaS with face-based employee profiles, analytics and open API for HR automation.

seo.title: Kaonavi — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Kaonavi: Japans leading talent management SaaS with face-based employee profiles, analytics and open API for HR automation.

when_to_use: Face-based employee profile system for Japanese enterprises
Open API integration connecting talent data to HCM systems
HR analytics dashboard on top of employee profile data
Performance review automation with structured evaluation flows
Workforce planning enabled by talent intelligence from Kaonavi

review.verdict: The dominant talent management tool in Japan — its cultural fit doesnt travel well internationally.
review.best_for: Japanese enterprises building searchable talent databases with photos and analytics
review.not_for: Global teams where face-photo-based profiles feel culturally mismatched

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Standard subscription/seat plan; downgradable next cycle.
